instructionsection.title: MOVA (vector to array, two registers) -- A64
instructionsection.heading: MOVA (vector to array, two registers)

brief.para: Move Z two-vector operand to two ZA single-vector groups

authored.para: This instruction operates on two ZA single-vector groups.
The single-vector group within each half of the ZA array is selected by the sum of the vector select register and offset, modulo half the number of ZA array vectors.
The vector group symbol VGx2 indicates that the instruction operates on two ZA single-vector groups.

The preferred disassembly syntax uses a 64-bit element size, but an assembler should accept any element size if it is used consistently for all operands. The vector group symbol is preferred for disassembly, but optional in assembler source code.

uses_dit.condition: FEAT_SVE2 is implemented or FEAT_SME is implemented

operationalnote_content.para: This instruction is a data-independent-time instruction as described in About PSTATE.DIT.

alias_list.alias_list_intro: This instruction is used by the alias

aliasref.hover: Move Z two-vector operand to two ZA single-vector groups

alias_list.alias_list_outro: The alias is always the preferred disassembly.

a.hover: Is the 32-bit name of the vector select register W8-W11, encoded in the "Rv" field.
Is the vector select offset, in the range 0 to 7, encoded in the "off3" field.
Is the name of the first scalable vector register of the source multi-vector group, encoded as "Zn" times 2.
Is the name of the second scalable vector register of the source multi-vector group, encoded as "Zn" times 2 plus 1.

ps.name: A64.sme.mortlach_ins.mortlach_multi2_za_insert_ctg.mova_za_mz2_1

intro.para: Is the 32-bit name of the vector select register W8-W11, encoded in the "Rv" field.
Is the vector select offset, in the range 0 to 7, encoded in the "off3" field.
Is the name of the first scalable vector register of the source multi-vector group, encoded as "Zn" times 2.
Is the name of the second scalable vector register of the source multi-vector group, encoded as "Zn" times 2 plus 1.

ps.name: A64.sme.mortlach_ins.mortlach_multi2_za_insert_ctg.mova_za_mz2_1
